title: Linux System Owner and User Discovery
description: Detects commands used to discover system owner, logged-in users, and user context. Attackers run these commands early in post-compromise to understand their privilege level and identify other active users.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*w *' or msg like '*who -a*' or msg like '*last -a*' or msg like '*lastlog*' or msg like '*getent passwd*' or msg like '*cat /etc/group*' or msg like '*groups root*')))
